description: Essential core tools for system monitoring, cleaning, and booting.

tools.name: Fastfetch
tools.desc: Ultra-fast, customizable system information tool written in C.

tools.name: BleachBit
tools.desc: Thorough system cleaner and privacy tool (OSS alternative to CCleaner).

tools.name: WizTree
tools.desc: The fastest disk space analyzer for Windows (reads the MFT directly).

tools.name: Everything
tools.desc: Locate files and folders instantly on Windows using NTFS indexing.

tools.name: Rufus
tools.desc: Create bootable USB drives the easy and fast way.

tools.name: Ventoy
tools.desc: Open-source tool to create bootable USB drives for ISO/WIM/IMG/VHD(x).

tools.name: Process Explorer
tools.desc: Advanced task manager from Windows Sysinternals.

tools.name: HWMonitor
tools.desc: Read PC systems main health sensors: voltages, temperatures, fans speed.

tools.name: CrystalDiskInfo
tools.desc: HDD/SSD utility supporting SMART reporting and temperature monitoring.

tools.name: AutoRuns
tools.desc: See exactly what programs are configured to startup directly during boot.

description: Protect your data, traffic, and personal identity globally.

tools.name: Cryptomator
tools.desc: Transparent, client-side encryption for your cloud files.

tools.name: OnionShare
tools.desc: Securely and anonymously share files and chat over the Tor network.

tools.name: VeraCrypt
tools.desc: Free open-source disk encryption software for Windows, Mac OSX and Linux.

tools.name: DNSCloak
tools.desc: DNSCrypt and DNS wrapper for iOS, enhancing mobile privacy.

tools.name: Portmaster
tools.desc: Free and open-source application firewall that blocks mass surveillance.

tools.name: Privacy Badger
tools.desc: Browser add-on that blocks invisible trackers automatically.

tools.name: uBlock Origin
tools.desc: Efficient wide-spectrum content blocker that is easy on CPU and memory.

tools.name: LocalSend
tools.desc: FOSS, AirDrop alternative to share files to nearby devices over local Wi-Fi.

tools.name: SimpleX Chat
tools.desc: First encrypted messenger without user IDs of any kind.

tools.name: KeePassXC
tools.desc: Cross-platform, offline, strictly local community-driven password manager.

description: Powerful open-source canvas manipulation and 2D drawing.

tools.name: Krita
tools.desc: Professional FREE and open source painting program.

tools.name: GIMP
tools.desc: The ultimate open-source image manipulation program.

tools.name: Paint.NET
tools.desc: Highly capable, free image and photo editing software for Windows.

tools.name: Photopea
tools.desc: Advanced web-based photo editor supporting PSD, XCF, and Sketch.

tools.name: Inkscape
tools.desc: Professional quality vector graphics software.

tools.name: Darktable
tools.desc: Open source photography workflow application and RAW developer.

tools.name: RawTherapee
tools.desc: Cross-platform raw image processing program.

tools.name: MagicaVoxel
tools.desc: Free, lightweight 8-bit voxel art editor and interactive path tracing renderer.

tools.name: LibreSprite
tools.desc: Free and open source program for creating and animating your sprites.

tools.name: Pixelorama
tools.desc: Free & open-source 2D sprite editor, made with the Godot Engine.

description: Prototyping, mockups, and collaborative vector interface design.

tools.name: Penpot
tools.desc: The first open-source design and prototyping platform meant for cross-domain teams.

tools.name: Lunacy
tools.desc: Free design software for UI, UX, and web by Icons8. Unlocked assets.

tools.name: Akira
tools.desc: Native Linux Design application built in Vala and GTK.

tools.name: Pencil Project
tools.desc: Built-in stencils for diagramming and making UI mockups freely.

tools.name: Excalidraw
tools.desc: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams.

tools.name: Tldraw
tools.desc: A tiny, very highly capable collaborative whiteboard.

tools.name: Draw.io
tools.desc: Free, high quality, and completely open diagram software.

tools.name: Figma
tools.desc: Industry standard collaborative interface design tool (Free tier).

tools.name: Uizard
tools.desc: Rapid, AI-powered UI design tool for wireframing (Free tier).

tools.name: Wireflow
tools.desc: Free online user flow architecture tool.

description: Non-linear editors, transcoding, and stream encoders.

tools.name: OBS Studio
tools.desc: Free, open source software for live streaming and screen recording.

tools.name: Shotcut
tools.desc: A free, open source, cross-platform video editor.

tools.name: Kdenlive
tools.desc: Libre video editor for advanced multi-track non-linear workflows.

tools.name: DaVinci Resolve
tools.desc: Hollywood-grade video editing, color correction, and VFX (Free version).

tools.name: OpenShot
tools.desc: Incredibly simple and powerful free video editor.

tools.name: LosslessCut
tools.desc: The swiss army knife of lossless video/audio editing.

tools.name: HandBrake
tools.desc: The open source video transcoder standard for almost any format.

tools.name: Avidemux
tools.desc: Free video editor designed for simple cutting, filtering and encoding tasks.

tools.name: Natron
tools.desc: Open-source nodal compositing software, an alt to After Effects.

tools.name: ShanaEncoder
tools.desc: Super fast, lightweight, and powerful audio/video encoding program.
